name: KEEMO Fashion Group Ltd
business: Keemo Fashion Group Limited operates in the apparel and garment trade industry, wholesaling men's and women's apparel to retailers in Asian countries. The company focuses on small to medium retailers with low to mid-range priced products. It sources inventory from suppliers and does not maintain production facilities.

exposures.sentence: we face risks associated with regulatory approvals of offshore offerings, anti-monopoly regulatory actions, as well as oversight on cybersecurity and data privacy.
On May 26, 2025, we acquired GW Reader Holding Limited, a company engaged in digital publishing.
